items.title: Restaurant chain's $10.99 burger deals McDonald's, Wendy's big blow
items.description: A thunderous shot was fired in the burger wars when national restaurant chain Chili's launched a value-priced burger meal that directly targeted fast-food chains, including McDonald's and Wendy's. Chili's plan: win away customers who frequent stores more often. While the burger wars continue, that ...

items.title: Government Reopening Would Help Restaurants in Washington Region
items.description: The end of the government shutdown would bring federal employees back to Washington, D.C., and boost sales for restaurant chains with a high share of their stores in the region.  The House of Representatives has a vote tonight to fund the government and end the shutdown.  In a Wednesday note,  Citi  analyst Jon Tower noted that  Cava  a Mediterranean fast-casual chain, has nearly 16% of its restaurants in Washington, D.C., Maryland, and Virginia, while salad chain  Sweetgreen  has about 12% of its restaurants in the area.

items.title: “McDonald’s (MCD) Had A Very Good Quarter,” Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 12 Fresh Stocks Jim Cramer Discussed Along With His Latest Thoughts On Quantum Computing . McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer recently discussed. items.title: Warren Buffett says ‘accumulating great amounts of money’ doesn’t achieve greatness—He still lives in a $31,500 Nebraska home and clipped coupons
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway mogul Buffett, worth $150 billion, says kindness is more golden than big bank accounts. He still eats at McDonald’s, and says luxury purchases wouldn’t make him happier.
